name: @agenaai/cli
description: Official command-line tool for AGENA — enroll your machine as a Runtime, run the CLI bridge, and manage tasks, skills, and sprint refinement from the terminal.
_bin_note: The brew-installed Go binary (aozyildirim/tap/agena) owns /opt/homebrew/bin/agena. When both are present, only the Go binary shadows agena command; this Node package intentionally ships WITHOUT a 'bin' field so `npm install -g` doesn't fight for the same path. The file bin/agena.js still ships (see files[]) so the Go shim can exec it directly from node_modules.
author: AGENA <hello@agena.dev>
